acceptance_met: Duplicate requests coalesce via per-game lock
notes: Single-flight lock implemented via BroadcastChannel with localStorage fallback. Lock acquired before launch (line 466), released in finally block (line 499). UI buttons disabled while lock active. Backend provides additional 5-second throttle per game_id. Critical fix applied: added releaseLock() call that was missing in finally block.

description: Added missing releaseLock() call in launchGame finally block
issue: Lock was acquired but never released, causing permanent UI lockout after first launch
fix: Added releaseLock() in finally block to ensure lock is always released regardless of success/failure
